subcodes.first_line: The letter of the friends of the West addressed to the beloved ones of the East was perused, and its contents were replete with diverse meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب یاران غرب باحبّای شرق ملاحظه گردید مضمون مشحون معانی گوناگون بود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @East and West; communication between East and West
